t.t: Submit products and follow their selection status

a.t-attf-class: btn btn-sm #{'btn-primary' if page_name in ('otm_vendor_simple_bulk_upload', 'otm_vendor_simple_bulk_group') else 'btn-outline-primary'}

t.t-foreach: [ ('Total Submitted', counts['total'], 'all', 'primary'), ('Draft', counts['draft'], 'draft', 'secondary'), ('Under Review', counts['under_review'], 'review', 'info'), ('Selected', counts['selected'], 'selected', 'success'), ('Rejected', counts['rejected'], 'rejected', 'danger'), ('Changes Requested', counts['changes_requested'], 'changes', 'warning'), ]

div.class: d-flex flex-wrap justify-content-between align-items-center mb-3 gap-2
otm-card-img otm-card-img-placeholder d-flex align-items-center justify-content-center text-muted

div.div: No products found. Upload your first product.

div.class: d-flex flex-wrap justify-content-between align-items-center mb-3 gap-2

option.t-att-selected: 'selected' if submission and submission.primary_category_id.id == category.id else None
'selected' if submission and category.id in submission.category_ids.ids else None
'selected' if submission and submission.gender == opt[0] else None
'selected' if submission and submission.season == opt[0] else None

div.p: Fill in the details and add one or more photos below, then tap Save — the product and its images are created together in one step.

div.label: Product Images
div.div: Add one or more photos now, or skip this and add them from the product page after saving.

div.p: Works without JavaScript — pick your photos and tap Upload. After uploading, you'll group the images into products on the next page. Maximum MB per image.
div.div: Please choose at least one image before uploading.

div.label: Choose Photos
div.div: Your browser will not let you submit without selecting at least one file — no extra checks needed.
Product created. Continue grouping the remaining images below, or leave the rest for later — they'll still be here.
Enter a product name and select at least one image.
div.p: Tick the images that belong to one product, name it below, and tap Create Product. Repeat for the rest — nothing is lost if you leave images ungrouped for now.
div.div: No ungrouped images right now. Upload more photos.

div.p: To update your profile details, please contact the purchase team.
